project.name: Clawvato
project.description: Always-on personal AI agent — your chief of staff

C.name: Google Workspace
C.notes: 20 tools. All file types. Gmail thread reading + batch parallel. Background extraction on read.

D.name: Memory + Embeddings
D.notes: High-resolution: chunked + Sonnet synthesis. Externalized prompts. Configurable tunables.

F.name: Security + Training Wheels (undo)
F.notes: Training wheels enforced (was bypassed). Trust level 1. Needs real confirmation UX.

I.name: Fireflies.ai
I.notes: 4 tools. Three-tier sync. Parallel batch fetch. Meeting extraction with Sonnet synthesis.

infrastructure.googleAuth: gws CLI → OAuth export → Railway env vars

knownIssues.title: Real confirmation UX — currently blocks with error
FTS5 query injection via search_memory
HTML extractor skipContent not nesting-aware
Google refresh token not in output sanitizer
Rate limiter resets on restart
Post-tool sanitizer only scans strings
scan_channel_history no trust tagging
buildFolderPathMap calls deprecated getFilePath
hasVectorSupport probe per call — no cache
Consolidation O(n²) merge — no LIMIT
Optimize deep reading — skip if unchanged
Drive folder scope allow-list
Live read_content caps Google Docs at 10K chars vs 50K for docx — inconsistent maxChars defaults
Sync maxFiles default 200, ceiling 500 — large shared drives have blind spots
Folder name resolution pageSize:1 — silently picks first match for ambiguous names
Fireflies search only matches title/participants, not transcript content
Background deep read result not in-context for current-turn answer
Participant display truncated to 5 in search results
Obsidian integration for memory visibility
Gmail Pub/Sub webhooks for proactive memory
Fireflies webhooks for new meeting auto-sync

currentSprint.name: Workflows + Intelligence
currentSprint.progress: Not started — all S2 goals complete

thingsNotToRedo: Don't split schema.sql on semicolons
Agent SDK is REMOVED — don't re-add it
schema.sql must be explicitly copied in Dockerfile
Google OAuth: gws CLI for setup, googleapis npm for runtime
Don't hard-code bot responses — prompts are in config/prompts/
Startup crawl skips if offline <5 min
Non-owner messages tagged [EXTERNAL]
Audit log sanitized BEFORE writing
keytar uses false sentinel — logs warning only once
File summaries are conclusions, not descriptions — stored as memories
Self-healing compares expected vs actual memory content
Folder path is evidence, not gospel — content wins over structure
One-time migrations use agent_state guard keys
Mid-loop text is NOT the final response — only capture from final turn
Don't force premature answers — let the bot finish (removed synthesis hack)
drive_read_content must return file content to agent, not just 'facts extracted'
Slack markdown block does NOT support tables — use bulleted key-value pairs
Document tasks require reading the actual file, not answering from memory
Email: always live search, NEVER sync (threads change too fast)
Policy engine regexes must use (?:^|_) to match prefixed tool names
Always parallelize API fetches, sequential DB writes
Gmail sync was built and reverted — wrong pattern for fast-changing data
